evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking disabled, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, no retry, and the approved source hash. The prompt asked for line-range locator candidates only; the prompt did not ask for character offsets or quote hashes. The output hit the admitted 1600-token output cap and the as-emitted JSON did not parse; per the locked run scope no retry was made because the call produced output. Spend stayed far below the $3 cap. Character offsets and quote hashes were computed locally only for reviewer-accepted corrected line ranges during the strict line-range review. Raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, and secrets are not committed. The output is proposal-only and method quality was not evaluated by this boundary record.
